issues.description: Effect allows K.O. up to 2 characters, but DSL has two separate KO actions without a 'maxQuantity' or 'upTo' constraint. Should use single action with upTo:2 and filter for rested Characters, or implement proper quantity limiting. Current structure enforces exactly 2 KOs.
Target missing 'rested' condition. Card text specifies 'rested Characters' but DSL only filters by cost. Must add resting state filter.
